taskDescription: Complete the crossword on the Vertebral Column

words.clue: Gel-like centre of the intervertebral disc that herniates in disc prolapse
Outer fibrous ring of the intervertebral disc
Elastic ligament connecting adjacent laminae, pierced during lumbar puncture
Anterior slipping of one vertebra over another
Exaggerated thoracic curvature, common in TB spine
Congenital failure of fusion of the vertebral arch
Joint between adjacent vertebral bodies classified as secondary cartilaginous
Disease of the spine caused by tuberculosis, named after Percivall
